title: Type-Safe Filtering DSLs
description: Architect type-safe filtering DSLs (Domain Specific Languages) for complex query interfaces. Design filtering logic that translates efficiently to optimized database or search index queries (e.g., SQL, Elasticsearch).
objectives: Architect type-safe filtering DSLs (Domain Specific Languages) for complex query interfaces.
Design filtering logic that translates efficiently to optimized database or search index queries (e.g., SQL, Elasticsearch).
